accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA context (chapter 8 of title 5 is the Congressional Review Act) is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; identifying the mechanism as the congressional review process is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose is to nullify the specified IRS digital asset broker reporting rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes that the resolution invalidates the IRS rule and notes the chapter 8 review authority.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions to note.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the approval date and passage dates in each chamber.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval and nullification of the IRS rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with minimal filler, appropriate for a one-provision resolution.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the IRS, the rule title, the Federal Register publication, and the CRA mechanism.

correct_figures.why: All dates (Dec. 30, 2024; Mar. 11; Mar. 26; Apr. 10, 2025) match the bill text.
